subject: eol trades with glencore commodities limited

emails.subject: EOL Trades with Glencore Commodities Limited
emails.subject_base: EOL Trades with Glencore Commodities Limited
emails.body: Tana, Glencore claims that the Governing Law in their EOL GTC's should be English Law. Do you agree? Thanks, Joe Forwarded by Larry Joe Hunter/HOU/ECT on 05/29/2001 11:09 AM From: Debbie Nicholls/Enron@EUEnronXGate on 05/29/2001 03:42 PM GDT

emails.subject: EOL Trades with Glencore Commodities Limited

emails.subject: Re: EOL Trades with Glencore Commodities Limited
emails.subject_base: EOL Trades with Glencore Commodities Limited
emails.body: Re: EOL Trades with Glencore Commodities Limited I do not agree and I am discussing this with Justin Boyd in London before I (or Justin) responds to this Counterparty. Joe, can you take a look at their EOL trades and see if there is any particular reason why their trades might be taking more than 24 hours to get a confirmation out? Thanks. Larry Joe Hunter 05/29/2001 11:26 AM
